message:
feat(connector,claims): expand claim compiler, snapshot policy, and transition abort logic

Claim compiler (claims/claim_compiler.rs, connector/claim_compiler.rs):
- Expand claim compilation logic with additional validation and
  evidence production (+86 lines in connector, +70/-23 lines in claims)
- Wire connector claim_compiler into connector module (mod.rs)

Snapshot policy (connector/snapshot_policy.rs):
- Extend snapshot policy with additional coverage and hash-sealed
  evidence (+88/-12 lines)

Transition abort (control_plane/transition_abort.rs):
- Refine abort logic and evidence emission (+45/-21 lines)

Artifact contract (extensions/artifact_contract.rs):
- Minor refinements to artifact contract validation (+15/-6 lines)

Beads tracker: sync issue state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
